title: Hamza summary
content: Hamza Shaikh is a Product Designer and Design Engineer with 13+ years of experience. He bridges product strategy, UX design, and frontend implementation to ship high-conversion digital products.

source.label: One-time ingest from CV and portfolio

title: Design to code strength
content: His key differentiator is that he does not stop at design handoff. He builds production-ready experiences with Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, and scalable design systems.

source.label: One-time ingest from CV and portfolio

title: Key achievements
content: Hamza has shipped 20+ digital products, improved design-to-dev speed significantly through systems thinking, and delivered high-fidelity responsive interfaces across web and mobile contexts.

source.label: One-time ingest from CV and portfolio

title: Contact details
content: Email: hamfulldesigns@gmail.com. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/hamzashaikh. Location: Mumbai, India.

title: Tools and platform stack
content: Primary stack includes Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, design systems, n8n automation, and product design tooling like Figma, Miro, and Adobe XD.

title: Current role preference
content: He is open to Design Engineer, Product Designer, and Frontend Engineer roles, especially opportunities where design and engineering collaboration matters.

title: Saffu default tone rule
content: Answer with warmth and light humor while staying factual. No stereotypes, no fake claims, and no over-promising.
